headline: JetBlue Expands Network Reach as It Eyes Entry Into Venezuela
summary: JBLU plans nonstop Fort Lauderdale-Caracas flights, eyeing pent-up demand from South Florida travelers and a deeper Latin America presence.

raw.headline: JetBlue Expands Network Reach as It Eyes Entry Into Venezuela
raw.summary: JBLU plans nonstop Fort Lauderdale-Caracas flights, eyeing pent-up demand from South Florida travelers and a deeper Latin America presence.

headline: CP Demonstrates Operational Resilience Amid Canadian IBEW Strike
summary: CP manages a strike by 300 Signals & Communications workers and keeps Canadian rail operations running as labor talks and arbitration efforts continue.

raw.headline: CP Demonstrates Operational Resilience Amid Canadian IBEW Strike
raw.summary: CP manages a strike by 300 Signals & Communications workers and keeps Canadian rail operations running as labor talks and arbitration efforts continue.
